---
title: Two-Factor ANOVA
subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
    self-contained-math: false
    embed-resources: false
    smaller: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import importlib
import stats_project 
import random

# This is to clear cache and reload after edits to the .py file
importlib.reload(stats_project)
from stats_project import FactorialData
```

## Problem 1 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 2 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 3 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 4 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 5 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 6 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 7 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 8 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 9 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 10 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 11 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 12 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 13 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 14 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 15 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 16 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 17 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 18 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 19 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 20 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 21 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 22 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 23 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 24 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 25 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 26 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 27 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 28 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 29 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```

## Problem 30 {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```
